channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: ETH leads; altcoins eye the rotation. 📈 Altcoin Vector 50 flags capital shifting as ETH outperforms BTC 8%—answer: what comes next. https://Blockchain.News/news/glassnode-altcoin-vector-50-eth-outpaces-btc #crypto #altcoins #ETH

item.title: 🔥 ZAMA teeters on a cliff: bearish momentum, negative funding, and open interest imploding. Brace for a slide to $0.025 in 72 hours. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260415-prediction-zama-collapse-to-0025-within-72-hours #CryptoCrash #ZAMA #CryptoNews
